evidence: "Gotta love those wily Underwoods, always fascinating story line."
"It's a semi-satirical look at how Socialism is creeping into every aspect of American lives..."
"Sometimes plodding and seemingly disconnected. Sometimes doesnt make sense at first but then 'ahah' moment comes up..."
"It's an interesting work, somewhat entertaining, but nothing I will want to hang onto..."
"It's not a great movie, but somewhat entertaining, worth a look..."
"Acting is pretty good. Characters are fairly believable..."
"Others have said plenty about quality of movies here, both aesthetically and artistically, and I concur..."
"Same guy who produced 'Dreams From My REAL Father' made this film; Joel Gilbert..."
"Not huge King fan. I hadn't seen Shawshank or Dreamcatcher before..."
"You feel bad for Walt cuz he gets teased and s*** on by everyone..."
"If you long for some good old-fashioned entertainment at a reasonable price..."
"If you love to see a lot of ass kicking, you'll love it! Sold it on e-bay already..."
"I like to watch these on gloomy Sunday mornings now to brighten my day!"

summary: The user enjoys complex narratives with a focus on drama and political themes, often appreciating high production quality. They have a mixed preference for pacing and show a strong emotional engagement with the content, while demonstrating low brand loyalty to specific creators.
